actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 on LeftHand Ray Controller (id: 172617727) has m_Script {fileID:11500000, guid:cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc, type:3}, which is ToggleRay. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=235308789. Awake() already invoked at enable (SwitchInteractors(false)). To cover ActivateRay(), simulate user enabling the ray when directInteractor is not touching any objects. If directInteractor has no valid targets, ActivateRay will SwitchInteractors(true).
After ActivateRay sets isSwitched=true, call DeactivateRay() to cover the path that switches back (SwitchInteractors(false)). This validates toggling back when ray was previously activated.

MonoBehaviour_0 on RightHand Ray Controller (id: 1287520551) uses script ToggleRay {fileID:11500000, guid:cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc, type:3}. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor fileID=474225665. Awake() auto-executes SwitchInteractors(false) on enable. To cover ActivateRay() path, ensure the directInteractor is not touching any objects (TouchingObject()==false), then call ActivateRay() to switch to ray (isSwitched=true).
After ActivateRay() sets isSwitched=true, call DeactivateRay() to cover the switch back path (SwitchInteractors(false)).
